positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial flora arrangement featuring bioluminescent deep-sea coral mixed with astral galaxy constellations and geometric mandalas. The design must be centered and scalable, rendered in a vibrant palette of ultramarine blue, teal, iridescent lavender, and touches of cosmic gold. The overall style should be modern graphic novel art meets sacred geometry, emphasizing clean silhouettes and high contrast negative space. Use a flat graphic print style with sharp edges and visible, intricate line work, optimized for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, poor quality, text, watermark, logo, signature, copy, copyright, blurry, lowres, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photo, photorealism, 3d render, jpeg artifacts
